abort.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to the vacuum on port 8080. Check the IP address.

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to the vacuum on port 8080. Check the IP address.
error.invalid_auth: The robot rejected the HTTP password. Check the 8-character code from the QR sticker on your robot.
error.invalid_password: The HTTP password must be blank or exactly 8 characters.

user.title: Set up Rowenta Xplorer 120
user.description: Enter the local IP address of your vacuum. The map will be fetched automatically from the device.

data_description.host: Local IP address of the vacuum (e.g. 192.168.1.50).
data_description.name: A friendly nickname for this vacuum (e.g. Merry, Daisy, Rosie).
data_description.http_password: Only for Serie 130/140/375+ models where you enabled the HTTP lock in the native app. The 8-character code from the QR sticker on your robot. Leave blank for Serie 120/S220/S240 and for AICU models where the lock was never enabled (the default).

zeroconf_confirm.description: Do you want to add Rowenta Xplorer 120 at {host} to Home Assistant?

data_description.name: A friendly nickname for this vacuum (e.g. Merry, Daisy, Rosie).
data_description.http_password: Leave blank unless you enabled the HTTP lock in the native app (Serie 130/140/375+). The 8-character code from the QR sticker on your robot.

reauth_confirm.title: Rowenta HTTP Password
reauth_confirm.description: Your robot now requires an HTTP password (the HTTP lock is enabled). Enter the 8-character code from the QR sticker on your robot.

data_description.http_password: The 8-character code from the QR sticker on your robot.

select_map.title: Select Floor Map
select_map.description: Found {map_count} map(s) on your vacuum at {host}.

data_description.map_id: Select the floor to use. Maps you have named in the RobEye app appear by name. Unnamed maps appear as Map 1, Map 2, etc. The active map is marked with ✓.

data_description.name: A friendly nickname for this vacuum (e.g. Merry, Daisy, Rosie).
data_description.http_password: The 8-character HTTP password (Serie 130/140/375+ only). Leave blank if your robot's HTTP lock is not enabled.

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to the vacuum on port 8080. Check the IP address.
error.invalid_auth: The robot rejected the HTTP password. Check the 8-character code from the QR sticker on your robot.
error.invalid_password: The HTTP password must be blank or exactly 8 characters.

clean_room.name: Clean room(s)
clean_room.description: Start a targeted clean of one or more rooms by area ID.
